source.title: Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage Crane Other Lifting

event.top_event: Crush injury to right leg from shifting pipe
actions_taken: Medivac helicopter evacuation to onshore medical facility
Lessons Learned Report developed and reviewed with all offshore employees
Coaching session developed with contract superintendent
Formalized coaching session to be presented to all contract superintendents and foreman
event.summary: On October 3, 2025, at approximately 1230 hours, a contract fitter sustained a severe injury to his right leg during decommissioning operations on the EI-259-C Facility. While attempting to install stabilizing brackets to support piping during platform removal, a section of 8-inch pipe was cut approximately 20 feet away. Once cut, the remaining pipe shifted approximately 2 feet within a P-trap, pinning the contract fitter's right leg between a flange on the shifting pipe and the piping his leg was draped across. The worker suffered multiple fractures of the right femur and was evacuated via medivac helicopter.
recommendations: Conduct pre-job safety meetings that include discussion of crew locations during operations
Develop comprehensive Job Safety Analysis that addresses hazards of pipe movement due to stored energy
Implement procedures to secure piping before cutting to prevent movement due to stored energy
Improve communication between crews working in close proximity
key_phrases: pipe movement due to stored energy
limited mobility and positioning in fall protection harness

hazards.name: Work at height with limited mobility

threats.name: Pipe section cut without securing remaining pipe
Lack of communication between crews working in close proximity
Inadequate job planning and crew positioning awareness
Worker positioned in direct path of potential pipe movement

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA)
controls.lod_basis: Administrative control to identify hazards before work begins

supporting_text: The Job Safety Analysis (JSA) failed to address the hazards of the potential for pipe movement due to stored energy

The JSA identified 'pinch points by material shifting' with the hazard mitigation being 'keep body parts away from hazardous areas before moving.' However, the JSA does not identify the hazard that piping being cut needs to be secured so that it doesn't shift once the cut is made

controls.name: Pre-job safety meeting and job planning
controls.barrier_role: Communicate work plan and crew locations
controls.lod_basis: Administrative control to ensure all personnel understand work scope and locations

supporting_text: During the morning Job Planning meeting, there was discussion of cutting pipe for future decommissioning of the facility however, there was no discussion of what areas other crews would be located
The lessee conducted a pre-job safety meeting with the operators and the construction crew but failed to review the locations of where the crews would be located during the decommissioning operations
The CF and the crew cutting pipe were only 20 feet away from each other but there was no communication of what pipe the crews were cutting

controls.name: Pipe securing procedure before cutting
controls.barrier_role: Prevent pipe movement due to stored energy
controls.lod_basis: Engineering control to physically prevent hazardous pipe movement

supporting_text: The JSA does not identify the hazard that piping being cut needs to be secured so that it doesn't shift once the cut is made (pipe movement due to stored energy)

controls.name: Fall protection harness and work positioning
controls.barrier_role: Prevent fall and limit worker exposure to hazards
controls.lod_basis: Personal protective equipment for work at height

supporting_text: The CF was working at a height that required a fall protection harness with no scaffolding or other work platforms available
Due to working on the piping in a harness, the CF had limited mobility and positioning

controls.name: Crew coordination and communication
controls.barrier_role: Ensure awareness of adjacent work activities
controls.lod_basis: Administrative control to coordinate work between crews

supporting_text: The CF and the crew cutting pipe were only 20 feet away from each other but there was no communication of what pipe the crews were cutting

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
